description_long: This is a large, amphora-style vase with a rich reddish-brown ceramic body, featuring two prominent handles on either side. The surface is adorned with intricate golden-yellow decorative motifs, including a frieze of running human figures encircling the midsection, reminiscent of ancient Greek pottery. The neck and base are embellished with ornate floral and geometric patterns, adding to its classical aesthetic. The vase has a wide, flared mouth and a narrow, rounded foot, providing both elegance and stability. The glossy finish enhances the vibrancy of the colors and the clarity of the detailed artwork. This object would serve as a striking decorative piece in a public or formal urban setting.
description: A large, glossy amphora-style vase with golden classical motifs and two handles, featuring a frieze of running figures and ornate patterns on a reddish-brown ceramic body.
description_view_0: Front view showing both handles and the full frieze of running figures, with ornate patterns visible on the neck and base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one handle and a partial view of the running figures, with the flared mouth and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying both handles and the decorative motifs, with the frieze of figures fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other handle and a partial segment of the running figures, with the vase's curvature prominent.
attribute_pattern: classical human figures and floral motifs
